description: User will drop new per-face photos into /public/images/banners/ to replace the current campus/events/lab/neighborhood/new-liberal-arts/people/political-club/story JPEGs used as the 8 octahedron face textures in OctahedronHero.tsx (see FRAC-117 for original per-face texture wiring). Filenames + face mapping TBD when user provides files.
title: Replace octahedron face textures with new photos
